title: Optimization and utilities
description: A lightweight basic modpack with improved performance and useful utilities. This modpack does not include (almost) additional content.
body: A lightweight basic modpack with improved performance and useful utilities. This modpack does not include (almost) additional content. What's inside: 1. Technical optimization, performance improvement (memory usage, rendering, chunk performance, lighting, bug fixes, CPU scheduling, asynchronous path-tracing, worldgen performance, etc.) 2. Useful utilities that simplify the gaming process (maps, GUI clock, fast mining and tree cutting, JADE, REI, mouse tweaks, stack refill, sleeping bags, etc.) Versions: 1.20.1 (Fabric, Forge), 1.21.1 (Neoforge). Other versions are planned to be supported in the future. Have fun! Maintenance icons created by redempticon - Flaticon
